span.p:
FileDescription
shared open-file state:
offset / status_flags / dirent_snapshot / read_cache
Consumes:
read/write, pread/pwrite,
lseek, getdents64, stat/statfs,
ioctl/poll, sync/flock, path/as_inode/
backing_inode

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
OSInode
inode-backed File adapter
path + Arc
Consumes:
read_at/write_at
read_bytes_at/write_bytes_at
getdents64, stat/statfs, sync, ioctl
path/as_inode/backing_inode

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Pipe / Tty / Socket / AnonymousFd / ...
direct File implementors

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Inode
stable in-memory inode
dentry cache / stat cache / page_cache_state
Consumes:
find/create/mkdir
link/unlink/rmdir/rename
read_at/write_at
truncate/fallocate
statfs/stat_attrs
set_mode/set_owner/
set_times
vfs_node()

span.p:
ext4
find/create/mkdir/ls/getdents64(native)
read/write/truncate
symlink/read_link
link/unlink/rmdir/rename
chmod/chown/utimens/access/statfs

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
fat32
find/create/mkdir/ls
read/write/truncate
statfs
No symlink / hard link
No full chmod/chown/timestamps

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
easyfs
find/create/ls
read/write/clear
statfs
No subdir mkdir
No symlink/link/unlink/rename
truncate incomplete

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
tmpfs
find/create/mkdir/ls
read/write/truncate/fallocate
symlink/read_link
unlink/rmdir/rename
chmod/chown/utimens/statfs

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
virtual rootfs / mount overlay
find/create/mkdir/ls
delegates symlink/link/unlink/rmdir/rename
mount-point aware namespace glue

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
cgroupfs
ls/find/mkdir/rmdir
control-file read/write
statfs
No regular file create

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
devfs
directory lookup + device nodes
char/block read/write by node type
statfs
No regular create/mkdir

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
procfs
generated ls/find tree
many regular nodes read_at
some control nodes writable
statfs
Mostly no create/mkdir

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: break-word; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
sysfs
generated ls/find tree
attribute files read_at
statfs
Mostly read-only, no create/mkdir
